tluaIndexKeyVariance.tlua(9,7): error TLUA2322: Type 'Table<string | number, boolean>' is not assignable to type 'Table<string, boolean>'.
  Type 'string | number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
    Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
tluaIndexKeyVariance.tlua(10,7): error TLUA2322: Type 'Table<string, boolean>' is not assignable to type 'Table<string | number, boolean>'.
  Type 'string | number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
    Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.


==== tluaIndexKeyVariance.tlua (2 errors) ====
    // `Table<in out K, V>` is invariant in its key: K is an input when the table is indexed
    // and an output when it is iterated. Measured structurally it would come out
    // contravariant, which accepts `Table<string | number, V>` where `Table<string, V>` is
    // wanted -- and `pairs` would then report a number key as a string.
    
    declare wide: Table<string | number, boolean>;
    declare narrow: Table<string, boolean>;
    
    local a: Table<string, boolean> = wide;
          ~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'Table<string | number, boolean>' is not assignable to type 'Table<string, boolean>'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type 'string | number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
!!! error TLUA2322:     Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
    local b: Table<string | number, boolean> = narrow;
          ~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'Table<string, boolean>' is not assignable to type 'Table<string | number, boolean>'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type 'string | number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
!!! error TLUA2322:     Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
    
    // Identical keys relate as before.
    local c: Table<string, boolean> = narrow;
    
    // A value-keyed table is still covariant in the value it holds.
    declare numbers: Table<string, number>;
    local d: Table<string, number | string> = numbers;
